description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Artifacts that runs on push to master branch or tags, on pull requests to master, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow builds a project using MSVC on Windows, with a matrix strategy for x64 and x86 architectures. It sets up vcpkg and NuGet, configures and builds the project with CMake, packages the build, and uploads the artifacts. If the workflow is triggered by a tag, it also creates a release with the artifacts and changelog.
